title: heuffelia montana
intro: Heuffelia montana, also known as mountain heuffel or heuffel's mountain heuffel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Heuffelia montana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
